title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Win Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeated NC State 81-74 in the ACC Tournament, marking their third win against the Wolfpack this season. Malik Thomas led with 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their standing in the ACC Tournament and their chances for a national championship bid.

title: Virginia Secures Victory Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeated NC State for the third time this season with a final score of 81-74. Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder led the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum in the ACC Tournament and their overall season performance.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament
summary: Virginia is set to play against NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a key matchup in the ACC Tournament, determining which team advances further.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Predictions
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack versus No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers game in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights and predictions for fans and bettors interested in the ACC Tournament game.

title: False School Shooting Report Triggers Lockdown at NCSSM
summary: A hoax report of gunfire caused a lockdown at NC School of Science and Math's Morganton campus, marking the second false threat this week.
charlotte_impact: False reports disrupt school activities and cause unnecessary fear and anxiety within the community.

title: Approaching the First 90° Day of the Year
summary: High temperatures are expected to reach the upper 80s to near 90 degrees, potentially breaking a record.
charlotte_impact: This weather update informs residents about the approaching heat and potential record-breaking temperatures.

title: Fatal Shooting in Rock Hill Under Investigation
summary: A 21-year-old was killed in a shooting on Springdale Road and Sturgis Road. The York County Sheriff's Office is investigating.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights ongoing concerns about gun violence and public safety in the Rock Hill area.

title: Man Charged with Murder in Northwest Charlotte
summary: A man has been charged with murder after a 24-year-old was found dead off Belmeade Drive and Mount Holly Road on March 20.
charlotte_impact: This incident underscores the severity of violent crime and its impact on the Charlotte community.

title: Stabbing in East Charlotte Leaves One Injured
summary: One person was hospitalized with minor injuries after a stabbing on Winding Cedar Trail in east Charlotte. The motive is currently unknown.
charlotte_impact: This stabbing raises concerns about personal safety and the potential for violence in residential areas.

title: Firefighter Injured, Family Displaced in Huntersville House Fire
summary: A garage fire on Fremington Road spread to a home's attic, injuring a firefighter and displacing three residents.
charlotte_impact: This fire highlights the dangers faced by firefighters and the devastating impact of house fires on families.

title: CMPD Cracks Down on Street Takeover, Seizes Guns and Drugs
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police halted a street takeover and seized firearms and narcotics in a targeted operation.
charlotte_impact: This operation demonstrates law enforcement's efforts to combat illegal activities and maintain public order.

title: Pedestrian Seriously Injured in East Charlotte Collision
summary: A pedestrian is hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after being struck by a vehicle in east Charlotte on Saturday.
charlotte_impact: This incident underscores the importance of pedestrian safety and the potential consequences of traffic accidents.

title: Fatal House Fire in Stanly County
summary: A tragic house fire in Stanly County has resulted in one fatality. Investigators are working to determine the cause of the fire.
charlotte_impact: This incident serves as a reminder of the dangers of house fires and the importance of fire safety measures.

title: Crash on I-485 Causes Delays
summary: A vehicle crash on I-485 Inner Loop near South Boulevard closed three lanes, causing significant traffic delays. All lanes reopened by 2:35 p.m.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents can disrupt commutes and cause significant delays for drivers in the Charlotte area.

title: Chesterfield County Man Charged After Allegedly Shooting at Deputy
summary: Jonathan Ross McCaskill faces multiple charges after allegedly firing at a deputy in Patrick, South Carolina, leading to a standoff.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights the dangers faced by law enforcement officers and the potential for violence during standoffs.
